column7: We are asked to find the probability of how many hearts will appear when 10 cards are dealt. We are asked only to care about the suit of the card, so rather than making many different variables (based on the number/face value of the cards), it is easier to just make four variables (hearts, clubs, aces, diamonds). By making the draw value 1, the repeat value 10, and run it without replacement, we get results where the cards are drawn 1 at a time, and 10 cards are drawn without being reshuffled in every time the deck is dealt.
